title: pituranthos korolkowii
intro: Pituranthos korolkowii, also known as the Korolkow pituranthos, is a type of flowering plant in the Boraginaceae family. It is native to Central Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pituranthos korolkowii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
